entries.en: My cat's name is Felix.
Felix is lazy, clever and funny.
He is grey and white.
Felix is a very big cat.
He weighs almost eight kilos.
He has a big tummy.
Felix likes sleeping all day.
He also likes eating.
He lives a calm cat life.
Felix likes sitting on hands.
He likes playing too.
He can run fast at night.
There is another cat called Nyusha.
entries.ru: Есть еще одна кошка по имени Нюша.

entries.en: Nyusha is my dad's cat.
When Nyusha comes to visit, the night becomes noisy.
entries.ru: Когда Нюша приезжает в гости, ночь становится шумной.

entries.en: Felix and Nyusha run and play at night.
entries.ru: Феликс и Нюша ночью бегают и играют.

entries.en: Sometimes they do not let people sleep.
entries.ru: Иногда они не дают людям спать.

entries.en: I think Nyusha is funny too.
entries.ru: Я думаю, что Нюша тоже прикольная.

entries.en: I like cats very much.
Animals are cute and fluffy.
That is why I love animals.
Felix is a special part of my life.
